health_conditions: Hashimoto's thyroiditis with complete thyroid failure

benefits.description: Did not want food the day after first injection; noticed positive effect immediately
Lost 50+ pounds after decades of struggle; unable to reach goal weight previously even on OMAD 450 calorie diet
Felt pretty good after first injection; previously had zero energy

protocol_notes: Metabolism controlled by medication (thyroid replacement implied); cortisol levels also managed by medication. Starting dose noted as 2mg injection. Previously tried OMAD at 450 calories of protein and could not get within 40 lbs of goal weight.
